content:
Goal
* Please add "(case-insensitive)" after "dit".

* Please mention that words are always separated by a space.

Constraints
* Please add:
Words containing {{di}} or {{Di}} never have any punctuation marks attached.

Cases
* Currently, the validator inputs do not include the words "dis" and "Dis" (they're found in Tests 5 and 6 only). Please update the existing validators, or add new ones, to include these words.

* Please add a pair of cases where the message contains one or more words ending with "dis" (but not the word "dis" itself).

Thanks.

It shows I wrote this late, it needed quite some polish x_x

* Added examples.
* Added a strict definition of what a word is in this puzzle in the description rather than in the constraints.
* Added the "A bit dysfunctional" set of tests for words ending with "dis" not being "dis" itself.
* Added the word "dis" and "Dis" in the "Some dissonnance" and "In the middle" validators.

Wdyt now? :-)
Don't hesitate to approve if the puzzle meets CG standards, if you can :)
No worries 😁 It looks all right to me now.
